query: I want to fold everything together right after dinner so nothing gets wrinkled. Start dryer 1 in the utility room at the right time and set it to Running state and Normal dryness level. Time it so dishwasher 1 in the kitchen and dryer 1 in the utility room finish at the same time with dryer 1 in Stopped state.
